title: Superextensive electrical power from a quantum battery | Light: Science & Applications
why:
- This work demonstrates, for the first time, a complete quantum battery charge-discharge cycle with superextensive scaling of steady-state electrical discharging power.
- The experimental quantum battery is based on a microcavity design that uses strong light–matter coupling to achieve superextensive light-to-charge conversion under low-intensity, incoherent illumination.
- The charging rate and electrical power output of the quantum battery scale superextensively with the number of absorber molecules, exceeding classical limits.
- This is the first experimental observation of superextensive steady-state electrical discharge from a quantum battery device.
